inputs.text: Mujhe bahut tezi se bukhar chadha hai, sir mein bahut dard ho raha hai

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya

inputs.text: Mujhe abhi bukhar kam ho gaya hai, lal daane nikal aaye hain, masoodon se khoon aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: The combination of fever drop, rash, and bleeding gums is highly suggestive of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Rash and bleeding gums can occur in other viral fevers, but are less common

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria typically presents with cyclical fever and chills, not rash or bleeding gums

inputs.text: Mujhe abhi bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai, khada nahi ho pa raha hoon

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: The patient's symptoms and progression are consistent with Dengue, and the severe weakness suggests possible hemorrhagic complications

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the specific symptoms and progression of the disease

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the lack of cyclical fever and chills, and the presence of rash and bleeding gums
